title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Motilal Oswal

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Motilal Oswal
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Motilal Oswal in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Motilal Oswal:
Motilal Oswal is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Motilal Oswal!
